milestone.title: Verify integrity — prove the green was earned, not gamed
milestone.goal: A verify gate can tell whether the build EARNED its green or gamed the TDD signal — test/contract tampering is caught mechanically, the judgment cheats (overfit · vacuous · stub) by an independent adversarial refute-read, and a confirmed cheat self-heals for up to 3 honest re-build attempts before it HARD-STOPs to the human; a gamed green is never auto-passed.

tamper-tripwire.title: Mechanical tamper tripwire — freeze test+contract md5 at tests→build, flag any edit at verify

earned-green-rubric.title: Earned-green rubric — judgment cheats (overfit · vacuous · stub) scored by an adversarial refute-read

heal-then-escalate.title: Bounded self-heal then escalate: a confirmed cheat drives ≤3 honest re-build attempts, then HARD-STOPs to the human
